name: bugate
description: Agentic QA governance kit / SDTD gate engine: pre-code artifact gates, a physical write guard, gate agents, dual-runtime peer bridges, and governed memory for AI test development. Inert until the project carries a committed bugate.config.yaml.

interface.shortDescription: Govern AI test development with pre-code gates.
interface.longDescription: BUGate packages SUT-neutral Agentic QA governance: shared skills, fail-closed hooks, stdlib gate scripts, peer-review adapters, and optional memory-bus clients for imported SUT automation test repos.
defaultPrompt: Use BUGate to govern this SUT test workspace: recall the active profile, build the pre-code artifacts, and enforce the write guard before test implementation.
Use BUGate full check to verify this checkout's skills, hooks, gates, optional runtimes, and memory-bus wiring.
